title: IPv6 and Modern Programmable Networks · Packet Lens: Net Ipv6 Notation Prefix
summary: Extend the branch design for IPv6, centralized policy, overlays, zero trust, SASE, and infrastructure as code. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net ipv6 notation prefix increment in a dual-stack and programmable-network transition plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compress, expand, classify, and subnet IPv6 addresses and prefixes without inventing IPv4 broadcast behavior.
Document scopes, gateways, reservations, exclusions, VLANs, DHCP pools, static infrastructure, and IPAM ownership.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
